intentSynonyms: look up story comments in hackernews
fetch a single story comments in hackernews
view one specific story comments in hackernews
get comments for a story in hackernews
description: Get comments for a story by its ID. Returns all comments on the page with nesting depth (indent=0 for top-level, indent=1 for replies, etc.). Comments are in ranked display order. Use page for pagination.

story_id.description: Story ID to get comments for
